Realtime Earth — WebGL Diagnostic

This page does not use Cesium. It probes raw WebGL to find out why the 3D globe isn't rendering.

probing…

What to do

  1. If WebGL is not available — open chrome://settings/system → enable "Use graphics acceleration when available", then restart the browser.
  2. If Vendor / Renderer shows "Software" or "SwiftShader" — your GPU/driver isn't being used. Try another browser (Edge / Firefox) or update your GPU driver.
  3. If everything is OK here but the globe is still black — open the main page, press F12 → Console, and look for red Cesium errors.

Raw info
